title: Single cell survival assay
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fkmjf","text":"This protocol describes the experimental procedure used to measure single cell survival rates post nucleofection of human pluripotent stem cells (hPSCs).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3io60","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4btvr","text":"General Notes:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"463nj","text":"1. Throughout these protocols, the term hPSC is used to collectively refer to both hiPSCs and hESCs. All described procedures have been tested and work equally well for hiPSCs and hESCs.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

"],[" DMEM/F12 "," Thermo Fisher "," 11320082 "],[" Fetal Bovine Serum (FBS) "," Corning "," 35-011-CV "],[" Knockout Serum Replacement "," Thermo Fisher "," 10828-028 "],[" L-Glutamine "," Sigma "," G8540 "],[" Penicillin & Streptomycin (100X) "," Thermo Fisher "," 15140163 "],[" MEM Non-Essential Amino Acids (100X) "," Thermo Fisher "," 11140050 "],[" Heat Stable Recombinant Human FGF2 "," Thermo Fisher "," PHG0360 "],[" Y-27632 "," Chemdea "," CD0141 "],[" 2-Mercaptoethanol "," Sigma "," M3148 "]],"rowHeights":[23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23,23]}}}}
steps: hPSCs are cultured on MEFs as described in the collection "Thawing, Passaging, and Freezing of hPSCs on MEFS" dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b4msqu6e
0.5 million hPSCs are nucleofected as described in “Nucleofection of hPSCs" dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b4pcqviw
Seed 1/100, 1/500 of cells post-nucleofection into one well of a 6-well plate containing hPSCs medium with Rock inhibitor. Prepare at least 2 wells for each seeding density as replicates.
Change medium at day 3, 6, 8, 10, and then daily until colonies grow to medium size.
Perform Alkaline phosphatase (AP) staining as described in “Pluripotency markers staining” dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b4yyqxxw
Image the entire stained well with ChemiDoc (Bio-Rad). Use a white cardboard as background.
Calculate single cell survival rate by: N x dilution factor/500,000. E.g. For the wells with seeding density 1/100, the dilution factor is 100.

hPSC medium %s %s DMEM/F12 385 ml Fetal Bovine Serum (FBS) 75 ml Knockout Serum Replacement 25 ml L-Glutamine (100X) 5 ml Penicillin & Streptomycin (100X) 5 ml MEM Non-Essential Amino Acids (100X) 5 ml 2-Mercaptoethanol (10,000X) 50 ul Heat Stable Recombinant Human FGF2 (25ug/ml) 80 ul L-Glutamine (100x) A B 1 L-Glutamine, powder 14.6 g 2 MilliQ H2O 500 ml 2-Mercaptoethanol (10,000X) A B 1 2-Mercaptoethanol 0.78 ml 2 MilliQ H2O 9.22 ml Heat Stable Recombinant Human FGF2 (25 µg/ml) A B 1 Heat Stable Recombinant Human FGF2 500 µg 2 0.1% BSA 20 ml Final volume: 20 ml hPSCs Medium + Rock inhibitor A B 1 hPSCs medium 500 ml 2 Y-27632 (1,000X) 500 µl Final volume: 500 ml Y-27632 (1,000X) A B 1 Y-27632 5 mg 2 DMSO 1.56 ml
